methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series C → next-stage step-up multiplier (1.7x) to $315M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 3 same-sector + same-stage peers in Climate & Energy. Range: $700M - $2.0B.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Climate & Bio-Manufacturing

private.name: KoBold Metals
private.rationale: Same sector (Climate & Energy), same stage (Series C), post-money $2B+

private.name: Electric Hydrogen
private.rationale: Same sector (Climate & Energy), same stage (Series C), post-money $1B+

private.name: Amogy
private.rationale: Same sector (Climate & Energy), same stage (Series C), post-money $700M

data.narrative:
Lilac Solutions, a Series C climate and energy company that has raised $315M to date, is valued within a triangulated range supported by comparison to a focused peer set of same-stage, same-sector companies. The comparable universe consists of three private Series C firms in Climate & Energy—KoBold Metals ($2.0B), Electric Hydrogen ($1.0B), and Amogy ($700M)—alongside a broader universe of eight private peers and one public comparable (LNZA).

Two valuation methods were applied. The stage-progression method, using total capital raised as a proxy base, applies a typical 1.7x multiplier for Series C-to-next-stage progression, implying a valuation of $536M. The peer-median method anchors to the median valuation of the three closest comparables at $1.0B, with a range of $700M to $2.0B. These methods produce meaningfully different signals, reflecting differences in the company's capital efficiency relative to peer benchmarks.

Triangulation across both methods supports a valuation range of $455M (low) to $1.1B (high), with a median of $768M. The wide dispersion between methodologies—spanning $650M—reflects material uncertainty regarding where Lilac positions within the peer cohort on technology maturity, addressable market capture, and path to commercialization. Resolution of these factors would narrow the range materially.
